translation_notes: Signal implements mean-reversion strategy with bidirectional entries/exits. Used crosses_below/crosses_above operators to capture crossing behavior and sma_50 as a representative SMA (original source references 'SMA' without specific period). Exit conditions are straightforward reversions to the SMA level. Without the threshold value, the entry conditions cannot be fully quantified.
